title: Magnetic Button Shirts
summary: Shirts that look like standard button-downs but use hidden magnets for closure. Ideal for people with limited hand strength, arthritis, or one-handed dressing needs.

title: Smart Walking Canes
summary: Canes with ultrasonic sensors that detect chest-height obstacles and integrate with GPS for turn-by-turn voice navigation.

title: Adaptive Utensil Set
summary: Weighted or thick-handled utensils designed to stabilize hand tremors and provide a better grip for those with motor challenges.

title: Long-Handled Shoe Horn
summary: Extended shoe horns that allow putting on shoes without bending over, helpful for back pain, limited mobility, or post-surgery recovery.

title: Voice-to-Text AAC Apps
summary: Apps that convert typed text into natural-sounding speech or use symbols for communication. Essential for nonverbal individuals or those with speech impairments.
